128.1.6.5/12
ip binario -> 10000000.0000 0001.00000110.00000101
maschera -> 11111111.1111 0000.00000000.00000000 -> 255.240.0.0
ip network -> 10000000.00000000.00000000.00000000 -> 128.0.0.0
ip bradcast -> 10000000.00001111.11111111.11111111 -> 128.15.255.255
ottetti host -> 1.5
ottetti network -> 2.5




200.1.2.3/24
ip binario -> 11001000.00000001.000000010.00000011
maschera -> 11111111.11111111.11111111. 00000000 -> 255.255.255.0
ip network -> 11001000.00000001.000000010.00000000 -> 200.1.2.0
ip broadcast -> 11001000.00000001.000000010.11111111 -> 200.1.2.255
ottetti host -> 3
ottetti network 1




192.192.1.1/22
ip binario -> 11000000.11000000.00000001.00000001
maschera -> 11111111.11111111.111111 00.00000000 -> 255.255.252.0
ip network -> 11000000.11000000.00000000.00000000 -> 192.192.0.0
ip broadcast -> 11000000.11000000.00000011.11111111 -> 192.192.3.255
ottetti host -> 2.75
ottetti network -> 1.25 



126.5.4.3/9
ip binario -> 01111110.0 0000101.00000100.00000011
maschera -> 11111111.1 0000000.00000000.00000000 -> 255.128.0.0
ip network -> 01111110.0 0000000.00000000.00000000 -> 126.0.0.0
ip broadcast -> 01111110.0 1111111.11111111.11111111 -> 126.127.255.255
ottetti host -> 1.125
ottetti network -> 2.875




200.1.9.8/24
ip binario -> 11001000.00000001.00001001 .00001000
maschera -> 11111111.11111111.11111111 .00000000 -> 255.255.255.0
ip network -> 11001000.00000001.00001001 .00000000 -> 200.1.9.0
ip broadcast -> 11001000.00000001.00001001 .11111111 -> 200.1.9.255 
ottetti host -> 3
ottetti network -> 1



172.16.0.4/16
ip binario -> 10101100.00010000 .00000000.00000100
maschera -> 11111111.11111111 .00000000.00000000 -> 255.255.0.0
ip network -> 10101100.00010000 .00000000.00000000 -> 172.16.0.0
ip broadcast -> 10101100.00010000 .11111111.11111111 -> 172.16.255.255
ottetti host -> 2
ottetti network -> 2
